/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sentrix_proxy.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sentrix_proxy.dir/src/common/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentrix_proxy.dir/src/common/metrics_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentrix_proxy.dir/src/common/proxy_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentrix_proxy.dir/src/mqtt/mqtt_module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentrix_proxy.dir/src/coap/coap_module.cpp.o -o sentrix_proxy
